title: astragalus meracus
intro: Astragalus meracus, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its rich content of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and fatigue, enhancing immune function, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. In traditional Chinese medicine, Astragalus meracus is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
